title: First Solar Inc (FSLR) Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Sales and Strategic Challenges
text: First Solar achieved record net sales of $4.2 billion for 2024, a 27% increase year-over-year. The company generated a diluted EPS of $12.02, though this fell short of guidance expectations. The solar manufacturer sold a record 14.1 gigawatts of modules and ended the year with 21 gigawatts of manufacturing capacity. The company maintained a substantial contracted backlog of 68.5 gigawatts at an average price of $0.30 per watt. First Solar faced notable headwinds despite strong revenue. The company disclosed warranty charges related to Series 7 manufacturing issues estimated to result in total charges ranging from $56 million to $100 million. Additionally, the firm reduced international production output by 1 gigawatt due to policy uncertainties in key markets. Management provided optimistic forward guidance, projecting 2025 Net Sales Guidance: $5.3 billion to $5.8 billion alongside earnings per share between $17 to $20. The company expects to produce 18 to 19 gigawatts in 2025.
